name: Title: Soft Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE WATER, YEAST, 1 TEASPOON MALT, AND SUGAR in a bowl.
2. ALLOW TO WORK FOR 10-15 MINUTES, UNTIL FROTHY.
3. COMBINE YEAST MIXTURE, SHORTENING, EGG, SALT, AND BREAD FLOUR IN A FOOD PROCESSOR.
4. PROCESS TO COMBINE INGREDIENTS WELL.
5. ADD 1 CUP FLOUR and process until the mixture cleans the bowl - adding flour or water as needed to make dough moist, not sticky or dry.
6. TURN OUT ONTO A LIGHTLY FLOURED BOARD.
7. KNEAD UNTIL VERY SMOOTH AND ELASTIC.
8. PLACE INTO A GREASED BOWL, TURN TO COAT.
9. COVER AND PUT IN A WARM PLACE TO RISE FOR 90 MINUTES, UNTIL DOUBLED.
10. PUNCH DOWN AND DIVIDE INTO EQUAL PORTIONS.
11. ROLL EACH PIECE INTO AN 18-INCH ROPE and TWIST INTO A PRETZEL SHAPE (PINCH AT ENDS TO SEAL).
12. HEAT 8 CUPS WATER AND REMAINING 1/3 CUP MALTED BARLEY to a simmer, in a SAUCERAN, OVER A MEDIUM FLAME.
13. ADD 1 PRETZEL, SIMMER FOR 30 SECONDS ON EACH SIDE, and DRAIN WELL.
14. REMOVE TO A COOKIE SHEET.
15. REPEAT WITH REMAINING PRETZELS.
16. BRUSH WITH EGG WHITES.
17. BAKE AT 400 DEGREES for 20 MINUTES.
18. DIP INTO KOSHER SALT
19. SERVE HOT OR WARM, WITH ASSORTED MUSTARDS
